title: 剛なるダイヤは真綿の中に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is a media day for Satono Diamond, which
includes a photo shoot where she'll model her
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at the studio a little ahead of time. And
right now, she's...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hm-hm-hm-hmmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dressed in her signature racewear, Satono
Diamond moves around and strikes different
poses while checking how she looks on the
monitor.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I need to be confident that what I'm trying
to convey comes across clearly.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
When designing this racewear's motif, I
incorporated the feelings that I hold most dear
each and every day.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm hoping those feelings will come across to
everyone who reads my article.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, various aspects of her
signature racewear are rather striking.
choice_data_list: The diamond decorations make quite an impact.
The diamond decorations make quite an impact.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, various aspects of her
signature racewear are rather striking.
choice_data_list: The diamond decorations make quite an impact.
The diamond decorations make quite an impact.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, I agree!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They represent my name, of course, but they also
symbolize my unyielding resolve.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Take stalactites, for example.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They're formed when rain water seeps through the
ground and combines with limestone before
dripping down.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This water continues to drop in the same place for
tens, if not hundreds, of thousands of years,
causing the stalactites to grow larger and
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I believe the strength of an Umamusume develops
in a similar manner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: In other words, we hold firmly to our beliefs.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We set our minds on a goal and continue striving
toward it. I believe that is the path that leads to
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, her eyes are filled with a strong
conviction, much like that which she incorporated
into the diamond decorations.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad you noticed them!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I love how cute the ruffles are, of course, but they
also symbolize flexibility.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The higher and further away your goal is, the
more hardships you will face along the way.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No matter how resilient a gemstone may be, if it
were to clash head on with each and every one of
those obstacles, it would surely crack.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So that's why... sometimes it's better to be pliable
and parry those hardships aside.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I believe doing so helps reduce needless worry
and allows one to focus on the road ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, her eyes are filled with a soft light,
much like the gentle conviction she incorporated
into the design of her ruffles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We talk for a while, but there's still some time
before the photo shoot.
choice_data_list: Would you like a drink while we wait?
Would you like a drink while we wait?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That's a splendid idea. Let's have some tea!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um... Is there somewhere we can buy tea around
here?
choice_data_list: I think there's a vending machine in the hall—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The vending machine! I thought it looked a little
different to the usual ones, so I wanted to check
it out!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Leave this to me. I'll go buy us some tea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch as she eagerly heads off to get the tea.
...However, I start to worry when I recall her
saying the machine looked different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing I should have gone too, I follow after
her...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? I don't see any cans or bottles. Am I
supposed to touch this panel? Or this button?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clunk, clunk.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh! A cup came out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clatter, clatter!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ice?! Not tea? Should I stop it?
choice_data_list:
I'll be there right away, so just wait and don't
touch anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she continues to build on her strengths,
there are still areas that she needs to work on. I
decide to keep a closer eye on her in the future.
